hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && b=$(git branch --show-current) && if [ "$b" != "main" ]; then git fetch origin main >/dev/null 2>&1; git checkout -B main origin/main >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo "SessionStart hook: was on branch '$b' — switched to main (this repo is main-only, no branches, no PRs)." || echo "SessionStart hook: on branch '$b' and could NOT auto-switch to main — switch manually before working (main-only repo)."; fi
